business_objective: Improve lead-data quality, matching, and attribution visibility.
Strengthen local search visibility and conversion pathways.
Standardize source capture, routing, and conversion verification.
Identify documentation gaps, cancellation risk, and process bottlenecks.
Standardize qualification, deduplication, and controlled review outreach.
Connect delivery evidence, campaign costs, CTAs, and response tracking.
Control outreach eligibility, suppression, follow-up, and reporting.
Separate qualified lead evidence from behavioral conversion events.
Evaluate AI vendors across value, cost, integration, risk, and scale.
Centralize KPI, milestone, blocker, and decision visibility.
Support targeting, forecasting, and campaign prioritization.
Create repeatable planning, QA, approval, and publishing workflows.
